overlay_content.name: Overlay Content
overlay_content.value: Genuine Nissan Accessories deliver original-fit performance for your Sentra. [*] Images shown for illustrative purposes only. For complete limited warranty details, see your Nissan dealer and read the vehicle’s Warranty Information Booklet.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
SENTRA EXTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Your look, your Sentra

Dial in your Sentra with Nissan Genuine Accessories — built to fit, made to last, and designed to elevate your style. No guesswork, no compromises — just the perfect pieces to make your signature Sentra.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
18" Black Machined Finish Wheels

  • Lightweight and strong aluminum-alloy
  • Black with machined finish accents
  • 18" 5-split spoke design

MSRP $610 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.

SENTRA INTERIOR, Lighting & Tech ACCESSORIES

Add your touch

Elevate your Sentra’s interior with Genuine Nissan Accessories — bold lighting upgrades, customized protection, and stylized details. Own every mile with a customized cabin that’s fresh, organized, and unmistakably yours.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value: • Shop All Interior

html_content.value:
Interior Accent Lighting

  • LEDs with 20 pre-programmed color options light up the front and rear footwells, cup holders, and console bin
